title: Macos Skeuomorphic App Icon AI
sourceTitle: Macos Skeuomorphic App Icon AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Modern light skeuomorphic macOS app icon for Little Elephant Fast Food, built around cute elephant head holding a tiny burger, rendered as a polished macOS-style food app icon. Subject: cute elephant head holding a tiny burger, rendered as a polished macOS-style food app icon communicates fast food ordering app as a friendly, polished single icon concept without visible interface text. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Single squircle icon with smooth continuous rounded corners, centered, filling about 80% of the frame with balanced internal spacing and clear silhouette. Signature Elements: Preserved macos skeuomorphic app icon source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Modern light skeuomorphic macOS App Store icon style with soft depth, clean gradients, gentle highlights, tactile rounded forms, and polished app-brand finish. Color Palette: Fixed clean white canvas, soft warm fast-food accents, friendly elephant grey or blue-grey, burger golden-brown detail, subtle shadows, and restrained macOS-style highlights. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Typography: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
